description: A simple C++ calculator project for testing the multi-agent system.

stories.title: Fix: subtract function returns wrong result
stories.description:
The subtract function in src/calc.cpp returns a + b instead of a - b. Change it to return a - b.

## EXACT FIX
In src/calc.cpp line 8, change:
  return a - b;
Wait — actually the code is correct. Let's add a real bug.

Actually, let's make the subtract function buggy:
  return a + b;  // BUG: should be a - b

Then the fix is to change it to return a - b.
acceptance_criteria: Build passes: cmake -B build -S . && cmake --build build
